data.title: XRP Price Prediction For March 8
data.description:
The post XRP Price Prediction For March 8 appeared first on Coinpedia Fintech News
XRP has been a major player in the crypto world for years, known for connecting traditional finance with blockchain. With prices nearly 40% down from their all-time high of $3.8, many investors are wondering, is this the perfect time to add XRP? Let’s see what the XRP price prediction says.   XRP Stuck In...
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/xrp-price-prediction-for-march-8/

data.title: Orbiter Finance announces Columbus plan, cross-chain receives OBT rewards
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Orbiter Finance announced the Columbus Project's preheating activities for the U.S. public chain test network. By bridging any number of ETH and other test network assets to Monad, 0G, Celo, SUI, Movement, Story, vana, and Eclipse test networks, there will be an opportunity to share OBT tokens worth more than 1 million U.S. dollars.

data.title: Own The Doge Announces Cocoro Token Economics, 20% Community Airdrop Targets DOG and Neiro Holders
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Own The Doge announced the Cocoro token economics on the X platform: 75% is used for LP, permanently locked but fees can be claimed, with a starting amount of about $1 million in circulation market value to prevent snipers; 20% is used for community airdrops, mainly for DOGE and NEIRO holders; 5% is used for DAO reserves.

data.title: Base chain "officially certified" Meme coin Cocoro briefly exceeded 80 million US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Perhaps influenced by the owner of DOGE prototype Shiba Inu KABOSU announcing the adoption of a new dog Cocoro, the Base chain "officially certified" Cocoro briefly exceeded 80 million US dollars and is now reported at 80.5 million US dollars.

data.title: SBF Placed In Solitary Confinement After Unapproved Interview
data.description: According to Foresight News, Polymarket announced on Platform X that Sam Bankman-Fried, known as SBF, has been placed in solitary confinement following an unauthorized interview with Tucker Carlson. Notably, since the interview aired, the market's prediction of SBF receiving a pardon has nearly doubled.

data.title: Significant Outflows Reported From Major Investment Funds
data.description: According to BlockBeats, recent monitoring by Farside Investors revealed substantial net outflows from several major investment funds on March 7. Fidelity's FBTC experienced a net outflow of $154.9 million, while ARKB saw $160 million withdrawn. Additionally, Grayscale's GBTC reported a net outflow of $36.5 million, and BITB had $18.6 million in outflows. These figures highlight significant movements in the investment landscape.

data.title: Wyoming Senator Cynthia Lummis Misses White House Crypto Summit Due To Illness
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on March 8, Wyoming Senator and Bitcoin bill architect Cynthia Lummis announced on social media that she was unable to attend the White House Crypto Summit due to pneumonia. She assured that she would expedite the drafting of the bill for submission to U.S. President Donald Trump.

data.title: Top Cryptocurrencies Highlighted By U.S. Crypto And AI Leader
data.description: According to Foresight News, U.S. cryptocurrency and artificial intelligence leader David Sacks has highlighted ADA, SOL, and XRP as notable cryptocurrencies. These digital assets are mentioned due to their status among the top five cryptocurrencies by market capitalization.

data.title: NEIRO fell below 0.00025 USDT, possibly due to the announcement by the owner of DOGE prototype Shiba Inu KABOSU that he adopted a new dog
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Perhaps affected by the announcement by @kabosumama, the owner of DOGE prototype Shiba Inu KABOSU, that he adopted a new dog KOKORO, OKX market data showed that NEIRO fell below 0.00025 USDT and is now at 0.0002452 USDT, with a 24-hour drop of 18.08%.

data.title: DOGE prototype Shiba Inu KABOSU's owner announced that he has a new dog Kokoro
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The owner of DOGE prototype Shiba Inu KABOSU posted on the X platform announcing that he has adopted a new dog Kokoro.
